topics: 💸 R' Chanina vs. Bar Pedayah: how to assess damage payment
🏷️ אֵין שָׁמִין — no appraisal for thief, robber, or borrower
📜 Rav Yehudah b'shem Shmuel: only nezakin get appraisal
🛡️ Mishnah 1:2 — שמירה generates liability: כָּל שֶׁחַבְתִּי בִשְׁמִירָתוֹ
🔥 Why R' Chiyya leaves fire off the שמירה list

overview.title: 📖 Overview — Assessing Payment and the Duty to Guard
overview.label: The sugya:
overview.text: The daf opens with two complementary derashot — R' Chanina anchors damage-assessment in מַכֶּה בְהֵמָה יְשַׁלְּמֶנָּה, and Bar Pedayah anchors limits in אִם טָרֹף יִטָּרֵף. R' Nasa shows each is needed: neither alone would generate the right rule. The sugya then tackles אֵין שָׁמִין — that ganav, gazlan, and (for Shmuel's expanded view) sho'el do not get the appraisal-discount that nezakin do. The daf closes by opening Mishnah 1:2: liability flows from שמירה, and R' Chiyya's beraita maps that onto שור and בור — but pointedly omits אש.
overview.hebrewSource: כָּל שֶׁחַבְתִּי בִשְׁמִירָתוֹ הִכְשַׁרְתִּי אֶת נִזְקוֹ

slides.title: 💬 R' Chanina vs. Bar Pedayah
slides.subtitle: Two derashot that together fix how damage is paid.

lines.speaker: RḤ
lines.text: מַכֶּה בְהֵמָה יְשַׁלְּמֶנָּה — read as יְשַׁלֵּם פְּחָתָהּ. The mazik pays the diminution in value.

lines.speaker: BP
lines.text: אִם טָרֹף יִטָּרֵף יְבִיאֵהוּ עֵד — bring the carcass and you don't pay for that case. There are situations of full exemption.

lines.speaker: RN
lines.text: Both quotes are needed: each one alone would generate the wrong rule for the other case.

callout.label: Yerushalmi style:
callout.text: Two seemingly independent statements turn out to be one halakhic system. The Yerushalmi loves showing that each pasuk does work the others can't.

slides.title: 🔎 R' Nasa's Tzricha
slides.subtitle: Why each statement carries its own load.

columns.label: Only R' Chanina?
columns.content: I'd say: for הֶכְשֵׁר נְזָקִין pay nothing; for נִזְקֵי גוּפָה pay only פְּחָתָהּ

columns.label: Only Bar Pedayah?
columns.content: I'd say: for הֶכְשֵׁר נְזָקִין pay פְּחָתָהּ; for נִזְקֵי גוּפָה pay אֶת הַכֹּל

nodes.content: Both together: צוֹרֶךְ שֶׁיֵּאָמֵר דְּרִבִּי חֲנִינָה וְצוֹרֶךְ שֶׁיֵּאָמֵר דְּבַר פְּדָיָיה

callout.label: Bottom line:
callout.text: R' Nasa shows the two derashot interlock — neither generates the full rule alone. Classic Yerushalmi tzricha logic.

slides.title: 🏷️ אֵין שָׁמִין — Who Gets the Appraisal Discount?
slides.subtitle: Rav Yehudah b'shem Shmuel cuts the list down sharply.

boxes.title: 🐂 Nezakin
items: Pay the diminution, not the original value
The carcass goes to the נִזָּק

boxes.title: 🥷 Ganav / Gazlan
items: Source: חַיִים שְׁנַיִם יְשַׁלֵּם — alive, not dead
Robber: וְהֵשִׁיב אֶת הַגְּזֵילָה כַּאֲשֶׁר גָּזַל

boxes.title: 🤝 Sho'el
items: Shmuel's expanded view: also no appraisal
וַאֲנִי אוֹמֵר. אַף לַשּׁוֹאֵל אֵין שָׁמִין

boxes.title: 🛡️ Shomrin
items: Watchmen are appraised like damage cases

callout.label: Key move:
callout.text: The Yerushalmi sorts liability profiles by their Torah source — and discovers that the appraisal discount is calibrated to the verb the Torah uses for that liability.

slides.title: 📐 Sources for the אֵין שָׁמִין Rule
slides.subtitle: Each exclusion has its own pasuk.
rows: Alive, not dead — full live value, no carcass discount
Return it as it was when robbed — original state

callout.label: Rav Chisda's gloss:
callout.text: נַעֲשֶׂה עִיקָּר טְפֵילָה — the Yerushalmi worries about flipping the main category into the secondary one. Each Torah source must keep its own profile.

slides.title: 🛡️ Mishnah 1:2 — Liability via שמירה
slides.subtitle: The new Mishnah reframes the avot as guard-duties.

steps.content: 1️⃣ Mishnah: כָּל שֶׁחַבְתִּי בִשְׁמִירָתוֹ הִכְשַׁרְתִּי אֶת נִזְקוֹ.
2️⃣ Even partial enabling — הִכְשַׁרְתִּי בְּמִקְצָת נִזְקוֹ — locks in full liability.
3️⃣ R' Chiyya's beraita: this rule covers שור ובור.
4️⃣ וְהָאֵשׁ לֹא תָנָה — fire is conspicuously absent.
5️⃣ R' Yose explains: fire is לְהֶכְשֵׁר נְזָקָיו — it triggers the five בעל חובל categories (נזק, צער, ריפוי, שבת, בושת).

callout.label: Why it matters:
callout.text: The Mishnah shifts the framework from object-categories to guarding-duty. Whatever you must guard — when it damages — you pay. Fire is excluded from the שמירה list because its liability flows through a different door.

summary.principle: Damage payment is fixed by interlocking pesukim, while liability itself flows from the duty to guard — except for fire, which has its own pathway.

flowSteps.content:
How is damage paid?
מַכֶּה בְהֵמָה יְשַׁלְּמֶנָּה

🎓 Mishnah 1:2:
Liability is a function of שמירה. שור and בור fit cleanly; fire enters through הֶכְשֵׁר נְזָקָיו.

quiz.q: How does R' Chanina derive the rule that the mazik pays the diminution?
o: מַכֶּה בְהֵמָה יְשַׁלְּמֶנָּה — read as יְשַׁלֵּם פְּחָתָהּ
quiz.e: R' Chanina rereads יְשַׁלְּמֶנָּה as יְשַׁלֵּם פְּחָתָהּ — the mazik pays only the diminution in value.

quiz.q: What does R' Nasa argue about R' Chanina and Bar Pedayah?
o: Each is needed — neither alone generates the right rule
quiz.e: R' Nasa runs a tzricha: each derasha covers a case the other does not, so both are required.

quiz.q: What is Shmuel's expanded view about appraisal?
o: Even sho'el gets no appraisal — אַף לַשּׁוֹאֵל אֵין שָׁמִין
Only nezakin get appraisal of the carcass
quiz.e: Rav Yehudah quotes Shmuel: ganav, gazlan, and even the borrower do not get the appraisal discount — only nezakin (and watchmen) do.

quiz.q: What is the source for not appraising for a robber (gazlan)?
quiz.e: R' Avin learns it from וְהֵשִׁיב אֶת הַגְּזֵילָה כַּאֲשֶׁר גָּזַל — return it in its original state.

quiz.q: Why does R' Chiyya's beraita on כָּל שֶׁחַבְתִּי בִשְׁמִירָתוֹ mention שור and בור but not אש?
o: Fire is not a real av
Fire is excluded entirely from נזקין
Fire's liability runs through הֶכְשֵׁר נְזָקָיו — the five חובל categories — not through plain שמירה
R' Chiyya disagrees with the Mishnah
quiz.e: R' Yose explains: fire enters liability via נֶזֶק צַעַר רִיפּוּי שֶׁבֶת וּבוֹשֶׁת — a different framework than ordinary שמירה.
